race.comment: CLAW MACHINE (3) broke through for his maiden win over 1050m at Toowoomba last time, scoring comfortably. Nicely drawn on the fence with the claim and he is definitely worth including in calculations. VIKING TREASURE (10) lifted strongly only to just miss last start over 1000m at Roma. Meeting a deeper field this time but she is good enough to play a major role. GALATH (6) is on a nine-day back-up after finishing in the money over 1200m at Ilfracombe. Good effort last start and is among the winning hopes. TELL US TOLL (9) showed little early speed then came with a powerful run to finish third last time out over 1200m at Barcaldine. Should be hitting the line with gusto.
